narrative:
Sandusky B (precinct in Sandusky County) has 379 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.5 percentage points.
